definition: Binary serialization format used by gRPC for efficient data exchange.

a Distributed System is a collection of independent computers that appears to its users as a single coherent system. Instead of sharing memory or a clock, these computers communicate by passing messages over a network to achieve a common goal.
A distributed version control system.
A JavaScript library for building user interfaces.
A static site generator built on React.

Passing OpenTelemetry trace context through message headers so async flows remain traceable in Jaeger.
